patches.find: does not include WIN-032 in its 39-domain audit engine
patches.replace: does not include WIN-032 in its live monitoring audit engine
patches.rationale: 39-domain is V50.6-era; V51.0 uses a 20-Domain Convergence Dashboard. Version-neutral phrasing avoids stale reference.

patches.find: at least 4 theological claims in the 67 that carry zero empirical content yet appear in the denominator of the 95.2% accuracy figure
patches.replace: at least 4 theological claims in the current WIN count that carry zero empirical content yet appear in the denominator of the dome's claimed accuracy figure
patches.rationale: Hardcoded 67 WINs and 95.2% are stale; wins.json has 71 WINs and dome accuracy is 94.5%. Version-neutral phrasing follows CLAUDE.md anti-hardcode rule.
